chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1898 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For orders on MA-16944/2016 4. For orders on statement. 16.12.2016. Mr. Muhammad Anwar Sangi, Advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Abdul Razaque Dasti, Advocate for respondent No.10 Mr. Zaheeruddin S. Laghari, Advocate alongwith respondents No.5 & 6 and respondent No.8 is present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Syed Amir Hussain o/b of SSP Jamshoro, SIP Roshan Ali Tunio o/b of SHO Jamshoro, SIP Ghulam Qasim o/b of SHO P.S Sorah. = Today, Mr. Abdul Razzaque Dasti, Advocate has filed his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.10 and Mr. Zaheeruddin S. Laghari, Advocate representing the respondents No.5 & 6 has filed Counter Affidavits. Today, respondents No.5, 6 and 8 are present in Court in compliance of the earlier order and they have categorically stated in their Counter Affidavits (filed today) that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioners nor they will take law in their hands as they also belong to a respectable family. This petition is disposed of in view of the above statement of the private respondents and the Counter Affidavits filed on behalf of private respondents with the directions that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners nor take law in their hands, whereas, the official respondents/police officials are further directed to provide protection to the petitioner, whenever they are approached with such a request and to ensure that life and liberty of these petitioners should not be violated by any individual including the present private respondents.

Today, respondents No.5, 6 and 8 are present in Court in compliance of the earlier order and they have categorically stated in their Counter Affidavits (filed today) that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioners nor they will take law in their hands as they also belong to a respectable family. This petition is disposed of in view of the above statement of the private respondents and the Counter Affidavits filed on behalf of private respondents with the directions that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners nor take law in their hands, whereas, the official respondents/police officials are further directed to provide protection to the petitioner, whenever they are approached with such a request and to ensure that life and liberty of these petitioners should not be violated by any individual including the present private respondents. JUDGE Shahid
